name: Termination for Convenience
description: One party wishes to terminate the contract without cause. Simulate the notice requirements, wind-down obligations, and financial consequences.

parameters.name: notice_date
parameters.description: When notice of termination is given (relative to contract timeline)

analysis_guidance: Focus on: (1) Termination for convenience rights — does the contract allow it? For both parties or only one? (2) Notice period — how much advance notice is required? What form must it take? (3) Wind-down obligations — what transition, data return, or handoff duties exist? (4) Financial consequences — are there early termination fees? Payment for work in progress? Prepaid amounts? (5) Survival clauses — which obligations survive termination (confidentiality, indemnification, IP rights)? (6) Data and IP return — what must be returned or destroyed upon termination? Within what timeframe? (7) Non-compete/non-solicit — do any restrictive covenants activate upon termination? (8) Dispute resolution — if the parties disagree on termination terms, what's the resolution mechanism?
